---
title: "Annie Adams"
subtitle: "Environmental Data Scientist & Educator"
image: images/headshot.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14rem
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/annaliese-adams/
      icon: linkedin
    - text: Github
      href: https://github.com/annieradams
      icon: github
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:aradams@ucsb.edu
      icon: envelope-fill
---

### Hi there! Welcome to my website!

My name is Annie Adams. I'm a lecturer in the Master of Environmental Data Science program at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management at UC Santa Barbara. I develop and teach coursework at the intersection of environmental science and computational methods, helping shape the next generation of data scientists to tackle real-world environmental challenges. Outside the classroom, you can usually find me hiking, cycling, mountain biking, or reading a good memoir in a hammock. I love finding landscapes in all these hobbies that reminds me why this work matters.
